channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Geopolitical news headlines curated by AI

item.title: Russia Violates Zelensky Ceasefire 1,820 Times, Killing 26 Civilians
item.description: Ukraine reports 1,820 Russian violations of Zelensky's proposed May 6 ceasefire, with attacks killing 26 civilians and injuring 118. Moscow also accused Kyiv of breaches, underscoring the conflict's deepening impasse.

item.title: Syria Dismantles Hezbollah-Linked Assassination Cell
item.description: Syrian authorities arrested a Hezbollah-linked cell accused of plotting to assassinate government officials. The operation signals Syria's continued efforts to assert control and address Iranian proxy operations on its soil.

item.title: Türkiye-Kenya Sign Defense Cooperation Agreement at Istanbul Expo
item.description: Türkiye and Kenya signed a defense cooperation agreement during the SAHA 2026 International Defense and Aerospace Exhibition in Istanbul, expanding Ankara's defense partnerships in Africa.

item.title: Freedom Flotilla Vessels Continue Gaza Mission Through Greek Waters
item.description: Four vessels from the Freedom Flotilla Coalition are sailing through Greek territorial waters en route to Gaza, defying the blockade amid the broader Middle East conflict.

item.title: Iran Evaluating US 14-Point Peace Proposal
item.description: Iran's foreign ministry told CNBC it is evaluating a US proposal to end the war. The development comes as Trump pauses the Strait of Hormuz escort operation, citing progress toward a deal.

item.title: Japan Fires Anti-Ship Missile in Joint Drill With US, Australia and Philippines
item.description: Japan Self-Defense Forces fired a Type 88 anti-ship missile during a joint maritime exercise with US, Australian, and Philippine forces, hitting a decommissioned Philippine Navy ship in waters facing the disputed South China Sea.

item.title: UK Local Elections Could End Starmer's Troubled Premiership
item.description: British voters are casting ballots in local elections that could hasten the end of Prime Minister Keir Starmer's troubled term, as the hard-right Reform UK party eyes significant gains.

item.title: Hantavirus-Hit Cruise Ship to Sail to Spain; Rare Andes Strain Confirmed
item.description: A luxury cruise ship hit by a deadly hantavirus outbreak with close to 150 people on board was due to head to Spain, while South Africa confirmed it identified the Andes strain of the virus that can spread among humans. Three passengers have died.

item.title: Ukrainians Trapped in Frontline City of Oleshky
item.description: Around 2,000 civilians remain trapped in the Russian-occupied city of Oleshky, cut off from food and medicine supplies for months. Residents face a "Road of Death" if they attempt to flee, with heavy mining and attacks making evacuation routes extremely dangerous.

item.title: Kim Ju Ae's Fashion Signals North Korean Succession
item.description: North Korean leader Kim Jong Un's daughter is being styled as his successor through sophisticated Western-style clothing and formal outfits, analysts say. Her evolving fashion, including luxury items like a ,900 Dior jacket, contrasts sharply with tightening controls on ordinary citizens' clothing.

item.title: Iran's Araghchi Meets China's Wang Yi in Beijing
item.description: Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi held talks with Chinese counterpart Wang Yi in Beijing, seeking China's continued support as Trump visits next week. Wang called for reopening the Strait of Hormuz "as soon as possible" while Araghchi stressed Iran wants a "fair and comprehensive agreement" with the US.

item.title: China Calls for Comprehensive Ceasefire in Iran War
item.description: Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi urged a complete ceasefire in the US-Iran conflict during talks with Iranian counterpart Abbas Araghchi in Beijing. The meeting comes one week before Trump's scheduled visit to China for a summit with Xi Jinping.

item.title: Anadolu Agency: Beijing Extends Support to Iran Amid US Conflict Ahead of Trump Visit
item.description: Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi emphasized international concern over restoring normal passage through the Strait of Hormuz during talks with Iranian counterpart Araghchi.

item.title: Japan Pivots Indo-Pacific Strategy Toward Southeast Asia
item.description: PM Takaichi used a visit to Vietnam to update Japan’s Indo-Pacific strategy, putting energy security, critical minerals and ASEAN resilience at its center.

item.title: South Korea Proposes Integrated Military Academy for Cross-Branch Training
item.description: President Lee Jae Myung aims to boost integrated operational capability by having future military officers develop cross-branch expertise from the start.

item.title: Italy and Turkey Deepen Defense Ties Through TB3 Drone Integration
item.description: Italy and Türkiye are strengthening NATO’s southeastern flank through defense cooperation, including TB3 drone integration and air defense system discussions.

item.title: Russian Strikes Kill Over 20 Ahead of Rival Ceasefire Declarations
item.description: Russian attacks killed more than 20 people across Ukraine, including 12 in Zaporizhzhia, just before both Moscow and Kyiv announced separate unilateral ceasefires. Ukraine declared an open-ended truce from May 6, while Russia announced a ceasefire for May 8-9 for Victory Day celebrations.

item.title: Deadly Hantavirus Outbreak Spreads on Antarctic Cruise Ship
item.description: Three passengers have died and one remains in intensive care from a hantavirus outbreak aboard the MV Hondius cruise ship sailing from Argentina to Antarctica. WHO is investigating the source as the ship awaits evacuation near Cape Verde.

item.title: Çin Dışişleri Bakanı İranlı Mevkidaşına Kapsamlı Ateşkes Çağrısı Yaptı
item.description: Çin Dışişleri Bakanı Wang Yi, İranlı mevkidaşı Abbas Araghçi ile görüşerek iki aydan uzun süren savaştan derin endişe duyduğunu ve kapsamlı bir ateşkes gerektiğini belirtti. Görüşme, Trump'ın Pekin ziyaretinden hemen önce gerçekleşiyor.

item.title: İran ABD ile Kapsamlı Anlaşma İstediğini Açıkladı
item.description: İran Dışişleri Bakanı Abbas Araççi, ABD ile savaşı sona erdirecek müzakerelerde "adil ve kapsamlı bir anlaşımı" kabul edeceğini belirtirken, Trump anlaşma yolunda "büyük ilerleme" olduğunu söyledi. Trump, Hürmüz Boğazı'ndaki eskort operasyonunu da durdurdu.

item.title: Rusya Ukrayna'nın Tek Taraflı Ateşkesini İhmal Edip İHA'larla Saldırdı
item.description: Rusya, Kyiv'in ilan ettiği tek taraflı ateşkesi görmezden gelerek düzineyle insansız hava aracı gönderdi. Ukrayna yetkilileri, saldırıların Karadeniz kıyısındaki liman kentleri hedef aldığını ve en az 22 kişinin öldüğünü bildirdi.

item.title: ABD'li Rubio Vatikan'da Papa Leo ile Dini Özgürlük Görüşecek
item.description: ABD Dışişleri Bakanı Marco Rubio, Papa Leo ile Thursday günü görüşeceğinden ve dini özgürlük konusunu ele alacağından bahsetti. Görüşme, Trump'ın Papa'yı İran-İsrail savaşı eleştirileri nedeniyle hedef almasının ardından geliyor.

item.title: Brezilya Lula Trump ile Örgütlü Suçla Mücadele Konuşacak
item.description: Brezilya Devlet Başkanı Lula, bu haftaki Trump görüşmesinde örgütlü suçla mücadele anlaşmasını gündeme getirecek. Başkan Yardımcısı Alckmin, ülkelerin transnasyonel örgütlü suçla mücadelede önemli işbirliği yapabileceğini belirtti.

item.title: UAE OPEC'ten Ayrıldı: Küresel Petrol Düzeni Yeniden Yazılıyor
item.description: BAE'nin OPEC'ten ani ayrılışı, kartelin zayıflamasına ve küresel petrol fiyatları üzerinde daha fazla oynaklığa neden olabilir. ABD'ye daha yakınlaşan BAE, kendi üretim artışını serbest bırakırken OPEC'in fiyat belirleme gücünü azaltıyor.

item.title: ABD Ordusu 'Hackathon' ile Silah Sistemlerini Entegre Ediyor
item.description: ABD Ordusu, Lockheed Martin, Boeing, Palantir ve Anduril gibi savunma yüklenicilerini bir araya getirerek silah sistemlerinin birbiriyle konuşmasını sağlamayı amaçlıyor. Ukrayna'dan alınan dersler, hızlı entegrasyonun savaş alanında kritik olduğunu gösteriyor.
